title: Story Repair Shop
description: A spoken story-logic game where kids hear a tiny broken story and tap the ending that fixes it, or pick the silly ending on purpose.
learningGoals: Predict logical story endings from cause and effect
Separate realistic endings from silly endings
Build oral comprehension through short two-sentence stories
interactionModel: choose-one tap an ending card after a spoken story prompt
feedbackModel: Correct endings get sparkle SFX and spoken praise; misses wiggle gently, get a chuckling spoken nudge, and replay the story.
credits: Emoji placeholder story cards only. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
